title: NeuralTrust AI Threat Detection /Red Teaming
description: NeuralTrust Red Teaming performs adversarial testing on agents, validating decisions against expected goals, simulating attack scenarios, and enabling sandboxed tool execution to uncover vulnerabilities, misalignment, and unsafe behaviors before deployment.

items: Agent Penetration Testing, Adversarial red-teaming: goal drift, prompt injection, hallucination chaining, & over-permissioned tool usage.
Sandboxed testing of all tool calls, code execution, cloud API triggers
